title: Confetti Celebration

statement.markdown:
text: Create a confetti celebration animation when a button is clicked. The animation should include confetti pieces falling from the top of the screen, and a 'Happy Birthday' message displayed on the screen.
requirements
The confetti pieces should be small rectangles with rounded corners, each with a random color and a random falling speed.
The 'Happy Birthday' message should be displayed in the middle of the screen for 5 seconds when the button is clicked.
The confetti pieces should be randomly generated every time the button is clicked.
The animation should be smooth and fluid.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Write the JavaScript code to generate the confetti pieces and the 'Happy Birthday' message.
Use JavaScript animations to create the falling effect of the confetti pieces.

gradingCriteria.description: The confetti pieces are falling smoothly and fluidly.
The UI elements are styled and positioned correctly.
The confetti pieces are generated correctly and randomly.
The 'Happy Birthday' message is displayed correctly and disappears after 5 seconds.
